# AI Unfiltered - Full Article List

> This file contains recent AI news articles for consumption by LLMs and AI agents.
> Updated every 4 hours. Links to original sources.

- Category: open-source
- URL: https://tldr.takara.ai/p/2604.00443
- Summary: If the same neuron activates for both "lender" and "riverside," standard metrics attribute the overlap to superposition--the neuron must be compressing two unrelated concepts. ### TrueConf Zero-Day Exploited in Attacks on Southeast Asian Government Networks
- Source: The Hacker News
- Category: security
